description: Standard return window: 30 days from delivery for unused items in original packaging.
Faulty or defective items may be returned at any time within the warranty period (12 months).
Items excluded from returns: opened consumables, personalised items, downloadable software.
Return shipping is free for faulty items; customer pays for change-of-mind returns.
Step-by-step return procedure: generate return label from account, pack with original materials, drop at carrier point.
Refund is issued within 5 business days of warehouse receiving the returned item.
Premium tier customers receive an extended 60-day return window.
VIP tier customers receive an extended 90-day return window with free return shipping.
Returns from outside the EU require customs documentation; processing takes 10-15 business days.
Original packaging is required for full refund; without it a 15% restocking fee may apply.
Lightly used items may be accepted at the agent's discretion with partial refund; clearly damaged items are not accepted.
Customers receive email confirmation when returned items arrive at the warehouse and when refund is processed.
Standard shipping within the EU: 3-5 business days from dispatch.
Express shipping option: next business day delivery for orders placed before 14:00.
Shipping outside the EU: 7-14 business days depending on destination customs.
Shipping costs: 4.99 EUR within EU standard; 9.99 EUR EU express; 19.99 EUR international.
Free standard shipping within the EU on orders over 50 EUR.
Carriers used: DHL for EU mainland, Royal Mail for UK, USPS for US, Correios for Portugal.
Tracking numbers are emailed when the order is dispatched and visible in the customer account.
Carriers make up to 2 delivery attempts; uncollected parcels are returned to the warehouse after 7 days.
UK shipping: standard 5-8 business days; VAT and customs handled at checkout for orders under 135 GBP.
US shipping: 7-12 business days via USPS; customer responsible for any import duties above 800 USD.
Aluminium laptop stand supporting screens from 11 to 17 inches; six-position adjustable height.
Wireless mouse with 2.4 GHz USB receiver; 18-month battery life; 1600 DPI; compatible with Windows, macOS, Linux.
USB-C to USB-C cable, 1m and 2m lengths; supports 100W PD charging and 10 Gbps data transfer.
Bluetooth 5.2 portable speaker; 12-hour battery; IPX5 water resistance; 360-degree sound.
10.1-inch tablet, 64 GB storage, 4 GB RAM, Android 14, optional keyboard cover sold separately.
Over-ear headphones with active noise cancellation; 30-hour battery; Bluetooth and 3.5mm jack.
1080p webcam with autofocus and dual microphones; USB plug-and-play; tripod-compatible mount.
27-inch 4K monitor; HDMI, DisplayPort, USB-C inputs; VESA mount compatible.
Mechanical keyboard with hot-swappable switches; ANSI and ISO layouts; wired USB-C and Bluetooth.
USB-C power adapter, 65W output; compatible with most modern laptops and tablets requiring up to 65W.
Laptop bag fits devices up to 15.6 inches; padded compartment; weather-resistant exterior.
Silicone phone case available for current and previous generation iPhone and Samsung Galaxy models.
Multi-device charging dock with two USB-C and one wireless Qi pad; 65W total output.
HDMI 2.1 cable supporting 8K at 60Hz and 4K at 120Hz; 1m, 2m, and 3m lengths.
All electronic products carry a 12-month manufacturer warranty covering defects in materials and workmanship.
Password reset: use the 'Forgot password' link on login; reset email arrives within 5 minutes.
Email address changes require confirmation from both old and new addresses; handled by a human agent.
Profile details (name, phone, default address) can be updated in the account settings page.
Account deletion requests must be confirmed in writing and are processed within 30 days under GDPR.
Accounts may be suspended for unpaid balances, suspected fraud, or violation of terms; reactivation requires human review.
Two-factor authentication can be enabled in account security settings; uses TOTP authenticator apps.
Login issues troubleshooting: clear browser cache, check email is correct, attempt password reset, then escalate.
Account merging is not supported; customers with duplicate accounts must choose one to retain.
Refund eligibility: order must be in returnable status; refunds issued to original payment method only.
Refund processing: 1-2 business days internally, plus 3-7 business days for the payment provider.
Refunds are always issued to the original payment method; cash or alternative method refunds are not available.
Partial refunds may be offered for cosmetically damaged but functional items; agent discretion within authority limits.
Refunds at or below 100 EUR are processed by the agent autonomously; refunds above require human authorisation.
Chargebacks are handled by the disputes team; customers who initiate a chargeback should expect a 30-day investigation.
All prices are in EUR including 23% VAT for Portugal; VAT rate varies by destination country.
Accepted payment methods: Visa, Mastercard, American Express, PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, SEPA direct debit.
Failed payments are retried automatically once; if retry fails the order is cancelled and the customer notified.
Invoices are generated automatically on dispatch and downloadable from the customer account; VAT-registered customers can request a corrected invoice.
Customer support is available Monday to Friday, 09:00-18:00 CET, and Saturday 10:00-14:00 CET.
Contact methods: chat (this channel), email at support@example.com, phone at +351 800 123 456.
Orders may be cancelled within 24 hours of placement if not yet shipped; later cancellations require human agent review.
Company is registered in Lisbon, Portugal; registered office address listed in account terms.
Customer data is handled in accordance with GDPR; privacy policy is available at example.com/privacy.
Customer tiers: Standard (default), Premium (spend over 1000 EUR per year), VIP (spend over 5000 EUR per year).
Loyalty programme: 1 point per EUR spent; 100 points = 5 EUR off next order; points expire after 24 months.
Complaints escalated to human agents are routed to the tier-appropriate team; VIP complaints reach senior support within 1 hour.
Out-of-stock items: customers are notified of expected restock date and may cancel without penalty.
Service is available in EU member states, the UK, Switzerland, Norway, and the US; other countries on request.
